action.description: Compress selected text or current file for AI context
Decompress TokenSlim JSON payload back to original text
Restart the local Rust backend service

idea-plugin.description:
TokenSlim: Optimize AI Inputs

Significantly reduce token consumption for Large Language Models (LLMs) by decompressing structured logs and code directly within your IDE.

  • Fast compression of build logs (Android, iOS, GCC).
  • Smart path and macro deduplication.
  • Automatic Sidecar service management.
idea-plugin.name: TokenSlim: AI Input Decompression
